overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a dystopian cyberpunk city at dusk, from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along a narrow elevated walkway beside a slatted industrial building, with hazy neon-lit skyscrapers and flying vehicles visible in the distance. The atmosphere is moody and rain-slicked, dominated by teal and orange neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway alongside industrial facility

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow elevated walkway, maintaining a straight path beside the slatted building facade

entered.detail: tall building with horizontal metal slats and glowing cyan interior lights
massive industrial complex with multiple smokestacks and illuminated windows against the hazy sky
tall metal pylon with multiple power lines stretching across the scene
concrete overpass structure crossing above the lower city levels

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous walk along a narrow elevated concrete pathway in a dystopian cyberpunk city. To the left, a massive industrial building with horizontal slats reveals cyan interior lighting, while the right side overlooks lower city levels with power lines and an elevated highway. The atmosphere is hazy and overcast at dusk, with a massive industrial complex looming in the center distance. A flying vehicle briefly passes overhead around the 22-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with palm trees and modern towers

events.description: camera turns right from narrow walkway onto open street intersection
exits enclosed walkway into open street with visible palm trees and modern architecture

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the walkway and turning right onto a wider street, continuing forward past palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street, silhouetted against the dusk sky
sleek modern skyscraper with illuminated windows visible beyond the palm trees
asphalt road with yellow lane markings and wet reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the end of the narrow walkway, transitioning onto a wider urban street. The slatted industrial building falls back to the left mid-ground as palm trees and a modern glass tower come into view on the left. The ground surface changes from concrete to asphalt with visible road markings, and the power transmission infrastructure from the previous segment is left behind. The industrial mega-building remains visible in the center background but appears closer as the perspective shifts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow industrial walkway into a wider, modern urban thoroughfare. It begins with a walk along an elevated concrete path, flanked by a massive slatted building glowing with cyan light on the left and a view of lower city levels and power lines on the right. As a flying vehicle passes overhead through the hazy dusk air, the camera maintains its forward momentum toward a looming industrial complex in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, transitioning from the concrete path onto an asphalt street marked with road lines. This turn opens the perspective to reveal palm trees and a glass tower on the left, while the industrial mega-building in the background grows more prominent against the cyberpunk skyline.
